## Checklist

- [ ] Specification updated where behavior changed
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data committed
- [ ] Architecture boundaries preserved
- [ ] AI behavior is explainable and auditable where applicable
- [ ] State-changing AI actions require appropriate approval
